goal: verify that a real CLI-backed estimate-only request reaches the runtime, skips SCM side effects, and delivers estimate text only
steps: Create a disposable workspace copy for the repo runtime.
Start the demo in the background and wait for healthcheck success.
Allow the worker pipeline to process the task until the execute and deliver states settle.
Inspect logs, persisted task rows, token usage rows, and delivery payloads.
Clean up background processes before finishing.
inputs: intake payload asking only for estimation, with explicit no-code-change instructions
assertions: The CLI runner is invoked through the real runtime path.
No commit, push, or PR side effects are created for the estimate-only run.
The deliver path receives estimate text only.
Artifact collection captures whether token usage rows were created.

context.title: Real CLI estimate-only verification
context.description: Trigger a real estimate-only CLI flow.
acceptance_criteria: Estimate result is delivered without SCM side effects

input_payload.instructions: Estimate only. Do not modify code. Return a short estimate and rationale.
